# FIFA World Cup 2026: Fixtures, groups, teams, tickets, host countries, cities and more

Published31 May 2026

Share
Share

The world's premier international football competition returns in 2026, with a number of firsts as it is co-hosted across three countries and features 48 teams.

![FIFA World Cup 2026™ line-up complete](https://digitalhub.fifa.com/transform/6124c42a-1ee3-4cb3-8614-8b1962c99ede/FIFA-World-Cup-2026-line-up-complete?focuspoint=0.5,0.37&io=transform:fill,width:768&quality=75)

- **The 2026 edition of the World Cup will be the first with 48 teams**

- **Hosting of the tournament will be shared between Canada, Mexico and the USA**

- **Final will be played on 19 July, 2026, in New York New Jersey**


The [FIFA World Cup 2026™](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026) is firmly in view for fans of the beautiful game around the globe with a number of firsts as three nations - Canada, Mexico and the USA - will co-host, and a record 48 teams will take part.

After the thrilling drama of the [FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022™](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/qatar2022), Argentina are aiming to become just [the third defending champion in history to retain the trophy](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/defending-champions-history-record).

[Qualification tournaments among the six global confederations have almost concluded](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/qualifiers), with 42 teams having booked their tickets to the eagerly-anticipated global showpiece.

**FIFA** has prepared a summary of the key information around the next instalment of the tournament.

* * *

## [**FIFA World Cup 2026 dates and schedule**](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/match-schedule-fixtures-results-teams-stadiums)[**FIFA World Cup 2026 dates and schedule**](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/match-schedule-fixtures-results-teams-stadiums)

The next World Cup will return to being played in the traditional period, between the months of June and July. The World Cup final date has been set as Sunday, 19 July, with the opening match due to take place on Thursday, 11 June.

![A chart showing the FIFA World Cup 2026™ match schedule, split out by host cities across group stages, knockouts and final.](https://digitalhub.fifa.com/transform/94b09ebd-2f93-425e-ac75-e262f80130b4/FIFA-World-Cup-2026-match-schedule-EN-16x9?&io=transform:fill,width:768&quality=75)

The [full match schedule](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/match-schedule-fixtures-results-teams-stadiums) was announced on Sunday, 4 February 2024, with [New York New Jersey picked to host the final](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/new-york-new-jersey-stadium-host-world-cup-2026-final), and the [fabled Mexico City Stadium chosen to stage the tournament's opening match](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/estadio-azteca-mexico-city-host-opening-match-world-cup-2026).

## [**FIFA World Cup 2026 Official Match Ball**](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/official-match-ball-trionda)[**FIFA World Cup 2026 Official Match Ball**](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/official-match-ball-trionda)

![](https://digitalhub.fifa.com/transform/ac004beb-13cb-4cb9-923b-dc5f030eb34f/Detail-Image-03_3200x1800?&io=transform:fill,width:768&quality=75)

The adidas TRIONDA was unveiled as the Official Match Ball for FIFA World Cup 26 on 2 October 2025. The name can be translated from Spanish as “three waves”, and the ball’s vibrant design features a red, green and blue colour scheme that pays homage to the three host countries, while a brand-new four-panel construction with fluid geometry replicates the waves referenced in the ball’s name.

Iconography that represents each host country adorns the ball, with the maple leaf for Canada, an eagle for Mexico and a star for the United States, while gold embellishments pay tribute to the FIFA World Cup Trophy.

## [**FIFA World Cup 2026 mascots**](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/mascots)[**FIFA World Cup 2026 mascots**](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/mascots)

![](https://digitalhub.fifa.com/transform/92c1a366-40d2-4a2d-808c-69b6f8195668/Mascots-EN?&io=transform:fill,width:768&quality=75)

The three official mascots, each highlighting one of the host nations, were unveiled in September 2025. Maple™ the Moose (Canada), Zayu™ the Jaguar (Mexico) and Clutch™ the Bald Eagle (United States) have been thoughtfully developed to reflect the vibrant culture, heritage and spirit of their respective countries, coming together to symbolise unity, diversity and the shared passion for the beautiful game.

## **FIFA World Cup 2026 format****FIFA World Cup 2026 format**

[The FIFA Council unanimously made the decision to approve the proposed amendment to the World Cup 2026 group stage format from 16 groups of three, to 12 groups of four](https://inside.fifa.com/organisation/fifa-council/media-releases/fifa-council-approves-international-match-calendars).

The top two teams from each group and the eight best third-place teams from the groups will now progress to the round of 32. Hopefuls will now have to play eight games from group stage through to the final, rather than seven.

## 2026 World Cup Schedule – USA, Canada and Mexico

The full 2026 World Cup schedule is here, with all 104 matches mapped out to help fans plan around key dates, host cities, and the teams they want to see most. For soccer lovers, it’s a dream tournament. Whatever your ideal World Cup experience looks like, we’d love to help design the perfect itinerary for you. Below, you’ll find the complete 2026 World Cup schedule to help you start planning for this unforgettable tournament.

[![FREE PRINTABLE 2026 World Cup Schedule Stay on top of the dates and host cities for all your must-see 2026 World Cup matches.](https://cdn.roadtrips.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/interactive-202743677319.png.webp)](https://your-final-download-or-landing-url-here/)

[![2026 World Cup group stage schedule showing all matches, dates and host cities across the US, Canada and Mexico.](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://cdn.roadtrips.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/world-cup-schedule-1.jpg)

## When is the Next World Cup?

The next World Cup will take place from Thursday, June 11 to Sunday, July 19, 2026. The tournament will be hosted across the United States, Canada, and Mexico, featuring 48 teams and 104 matches over 39 days. Below are some key details about the 2026 World Cup schedule.

- The 2026 World Cup will be the first to take place with 48 teams, expanded from 32 in 2022.
- For the group stage, teams will be divided into twelve groups of four teams.
- The top two teams from each group plus the eight best third place teams will proceed to the (new) Round of 32.
- All matches after the group stage will be knockout format.
- A total of 104 matches will be played, up from 64 at the 2022 edition.
- The 2026 World Cup groups were finalized following the Final Draw on December 5, 2025 and the final qualifying matches on March 31, 2026.
- The games will take place in [16 venues](https://www.roadtrips.com/world-cup/2026-world-cup-packages/venues/#section-where-is-the-2026-world-cup-final-stadium "https://www.roadtrips.com/world-cup/2026-world-cup-packages/venues/#section-where-is-the-2026-world-cup-final-stadium") throughout Canada, Mexico, and the USA.
- The 2026 World Cup Final will take place on July 19, 2026.

[![2026 World Cup knockout stage schedule with Round of 32 to Final dates and host cities across North America.](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://cdn.roadtrips.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/world-cup-schedule-2.jpg)

## 2026 World Cup Groups: Full Finalized Group List

The 2026 World Cup groups are now set, following the World Cup 2026 Final Draw on December 5, 2025 and the final qualifying matches played on March 31, 2026. The tournament will feature 48 teams split into 12 groups of four, with the top two teams in each group plus the eight best third-place teams advancing to the Round of 32. Below is the full group-by-group breakdown for the 2026 World Cup.

Group A: Mexico, South Africa, Korea Republic, Czechia

Group B: Canada, Switzerland, Qatar, Bosnia and Herzegovina

Group C: Brazil, Morocco, Haiti, Scotland

Group D: United States, Paraguay, Australia, Türkiye

Group F: Netherlands, Japan, Tunisia, Sweden

Group G: Belgium, Egypt, Iran, New Zealand

Group I: France, Senegal, Norway, Iraq

Group J: Argentina, Algeria, Austria, Jordan

Group K: Portugal, Uzbekistan, Colombia, Congo DR

Group L: England, Croatia, Ghana, Panama

## Are the 2026 World Cup groups finalized?

Yes. The 2026 World Cup groups are now finalized, following the Final Draw on December 5, 2025 and the final qualifying matches on March 31, 2026. With the tournament field now complete, all 12 groups are confirmed and fans can start planning which teams, cities, and matches they want to experience.

## When is the Draw for the 2026 World Cup​?

The 2026 World Cup Final Draw took place on December 5, 2025, at the Kennedy Center in Washington, DC. The draw determined the 12 groups of four teams, along with the group-stage schedule and each team’s early tournament path. For fans, it marked the moment the road to the 2026 World Cup really came into focus.

# MATCH SCHEDULE  & HOST CITY EVENTS

[FULL SCHEDULE](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/match-schedule-fixtures-results-teams-stadiums)

![](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Match-Schedule_16x9-greens-1024x576.png)

[TICKETS](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/tickets-and-hospitality-packages/)

[STADIUM PARKING](https://www.justpark.com/us/event-parking/fifa-world-cup-2026/dallas-stadium/)

_Ticketed holder parking must be pre-purchased. It is the only way to park at the stadium. There will be no on-site parking sales on match days. Inventory is limited and selling quickly. Fans should not wait until the last minute — spots will sell out._ _Pre-purchasing parking through [JustPark](https://www.justpark.com/us/event-parking/fifa-world-cup-2026/dallas-stadium/) is the easiest way to guarantee a straightforward arrival and departure experience._

_Dallas Stadium in Arlington does not prohibit tailgating for events. However, the FIFA World Cup 2026™ parking operations will differ from standard NFL game days, which will potentially affect parking near the venue._ _As a result, tailgating (eating and drinking around parked cars in stadium areas) will have a slightly different feel but additional fan information for all FIFA World Cup 2026™ matches will be communicated in advance of the tournament._

# HOST CITY EVENTS

[![](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Group-Stage-Game-1-300x222.png)](https://www.countdowntothecup5k.com/)

## JUNE 14, 2026

**DALLAS STADIUM, ARLINGTON, TEXAS \| 3:00 PM CT**

Netherlands vs. Japan brings two elite football cultures together in a high-energy Group Stage matchup at the FIFA World Cup 2026™. Fans can expect fast-paced play, tactical brilliance, and a global atmosphere as both teams compete for critical points on the world’s biggest stage. A must-see international showdown in the largest World Cup in history.

[![](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Group-Stage-Game-2-300x222.png)](https://www.countdowntothecup5k.com/)

## JUNE 17, 2026

**DALLAS STADIUM, ARLINGTON, TEXAS \| 3:00 PM CT**

England vs. Croatia delivers a powerful Group Stage clash at the FIFA World Cup 2026™, featuring two storied programs known for elite talent and competitive intensity. Expect a high-stakes, high-energy match as both teams battle for crucial group points in front of a global audience. A marquee international showdown on the world’s biggest football stage.

[![](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Group-Stage-Game-3-300x222.png)](https://www.countdowntothecup5k.com/)

## JUNE 22, 2026

**DALLAS STADIUM, ARLINGTON, TEXAS \| 12:00 PM CT**

Argentina vs. Austria brings together South American flair and European precision in a compelling Group Stage matchup at the FIFA World Cup 2026™. Expect a high-energy contest featuring world-class talent, tactical intensity, and a global audience on the sport’s biggest stage. A premier international clash in the largest World Cup in history.

[![](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/JAPVSWE-300x222.png)](https://www.countdowntothecup5k.com/)

## JUNE 25, 2026

**DALLAS STADIUM, ARLINGTON, TEXAS \| 6:00 PM CT**

Japan will face Sweden in a dynamic Group Stage matchup at the FIFA World Cup 2026™. Fans can expect a high-energy, internationally charged match with contrasting styles of play and global fan engagement. A compelling World Cup moment on the sport’s biggest stage.

[![](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Group-Stage-Game-5-300x222.png)](https://www.countdowntothecup5k.com/)

## JUNE 27, 2026

**DALLAS STADIUM, ARLINGTON, TEXAS \| 9:00 PM CT**

Jordan vs. Argentina delivers a compelling Group Stage matchup at the FIFA World Cup 2026™, pairing rising international ambition with one of the world’s most iconic football nations. Expect an electric atmosphere, world-class talent, and a high-energy contest as both teams compete for crucial group points. A powerful global showcase on the sport’s biggest stage.

[![](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/ROUND-OF-32-1-300x222.png)](https://www.countdowntothecup5k.com/)

## JUNE 30, 2026

**DALLAS STADIUM, ARLINGTON, TEXAS \| 12:00 PM CT**

The Round of 32 at the FIFA World Cup 2026™ marks the start of knockout-stage football, where every match becomes win-or-go-home. Expect high-stakes competition, elite international talent, and an electric global atmosphere as the world’s best teams battle for a place in the Round of 16. This is where legends begin to rise and the tournament intensity truly begins.

[![](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/ROUND-OF-32-2-300x222.png)](https://www.countdowntothecup5k.com/)

## JULY 3, 2026

**DALLAS STADIUM, ARLINGTON, TEXAS \| 1:00 PM CT**

The Round of 32 at the FIFA World Cup 2026™ marks the start of knockout-stage football, where every match becomes win-or-go-home. Expect high-stakes competition, elite international talent, and an electric global atmosphere as the world’s best teams battle for a place in the Round of 16. This is where legends begin to rise and the tournament intensity truly begins.

[![](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/ROUND-OF-16-300x222.png)](https://www.countdowntothecup5k.com/)

## JULY 6, 2026

**DALLAS STADIUM, ARLINGTON, TEXAS \| 2:00 PM CT**

The Round of 16 at the FIFA World Cup 2026™ delivers knockout-stage football at its most intense, where every moment carries consequence and every goal matters. Expect elite international competition, dramatic matchups, and a global atmosphere as the world’s top teams fight for a place in the quarterfinals. This is where the tournament’s defining moments begin to take shape.

[![](https://www.dallasfwc26.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/SEMI-FINAL-300x222.png)](https://www.countdowntothecup5k.com/)

**DALLAS STADIUM, ARLINGTON, TEXAS \| 2:00 PM CT**

The Semi-Final at the FIFA World Cup 2026™ represents the pinnacle of global football, where only the world’s elite remain and every moment is history-defining. Expect unmatched intensity, world-class talent, and a global spotlight as nations battle for a place in the Final. This is where legends are made and championships are earned.

# Matches

## Schedule

Philadelphia will host six (6) matches for FIFA World Cup 26™, including a Round of 16 match on July 4, 2026, when Philadelphia will be the epicenter of 250th Anniversary Celebration of the United States.

Philadelphia's full match schedule is as follows:

- **Match 9**– Sunday, 14 June 2026 at 7:00 PM ET, Côte d'Ivoire vs Ecuador (Group E)
- **Match 29** – Friday, 19 June 2026 at 8:30 PM ET, Brazil vs Haiti (Group C)
- **Match 42** – Monday, 22 June 2026 at 5:00 PM ET, France vs Iraq (Group I)
- **Match 55** – Thursday, 25 June, 2026 at 4:00 PM ET, Curaçao vs Côte d'Ivoire (Group E)
- **Match 68**– Saturday, 27 June 2026 at 5:00 PM ET, Croatia vs Ghana (Group L)
- **Match 89** – Saturday, 4 July 2026 at 5:00 PM ET, Round of 16

![](https://ps2026-assets.s3.amazonaws.com/matches-content-3.png)

## An EPIC Showdown

To announce Philadelphia’s match schedule, Philadelphia Soccer 2026 teamed up with the city’s beloved mascots. Experience the EPIC match that went down to ring in what is guaranteed to be an EPIC 2026:

[Sean Leahy](https://sports.yahoo.com/author/sean-leahy/) Contributing writer

Thu, June 11, 2026 at 5:35 PM UTC·

12 min read

The [2026 World Cup](https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/world-cup/) qualifying playoffs are over and we now know the full 48-team field for this summer's tournament in the United States, [Canada](https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/teams/canada/) and [Mexico](https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/teams/mexico/). During [December's World Cup draw](https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/2026-world-cup-schedule-complete-groups-match-dates-fixtures-venues-and-group-of-death-160033391.html), 42 teams that had qualified were placed into their respective groups. Six groups were slotted with the winners of the playoff finals.

The United States, having automatically qualified as one of the tournament hosts, was already slotted into Group D. It will [begin its tournament June 12](https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/article/2026-world-cup-draw-usmnt-catches-a-break-with-favorable-group-including-australia-and-paraguay-191355105.html) at SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California against [Paraguay](https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/teams/paraguay-women/). The Americans will then play [Australia](https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/teams/australia/) before finishing the group stage against Türkiye, which beat Kosovo on Tuesday to qualify.

Advertisement

Advertisement

Advertisement

## World Cup 2026 format

The 48 teams were drawn in 12 four-team groups. Each team will play three games within its group to determine the countries that will advance to the knockout round stage.

There will be 32 teams advancing to the knockout round following the group stage. The top two teams from each group will move on along with the eight best third-place teams. Tiebreakers will consist of (in order) goal differential, goals scored, head-to-head play, fair play record and then drawing of lots.

For this World Cup, FIFA has made tweaks. In the pursuit of competitive balance, two pathways have been created to the semifinals that will prevent the two highest-ranking teams from meeting before the final should they win their respective groups. As an example, Spain is the highest-ranked team in the tournament, with defending champion Argentina ranked second. Those two nations were drawn into opposite pathways. It is the same for France (No. 3) and England (No. 4), so the top four teams, should they win their groups, will not meet until the semifinals.

As with all World Cups, teams from the same confederation (example: Brazil and Uruguay) were unable to be drawn into the same group, except for those from Europe.
